heading: Omitted
label: 1728 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that payments to a tribe under this subchapter would not affect eligibility of the State for participation in Federal financial aid programs and that receipt of payments from the State would not affect eligibility of a tribe for Federal benefits, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 96–420, § 994 Stat. 1795Oct. 10, 1980
